title: Cucumber Mod
description: Just a mod that adds cucumbers...
body:
This is my first mod, I'm not great at modding. I'm going to update this mod sometimes and learn new things. Basically, the mod currently only has the cucumber itself, which can be bought from a farmer at level 1 of trade. When you receive the cucumber, you will unlock a recipe for creating a jar of cucumbers, which will serve as a good throwing weapon at the beginning of the game.

In the future, I still have many ideas for what can be added to this mod.
